description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in a light beige or tan material, complemented by wooden accents on the upper levels and fencing. The property includes a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a rectangular swimming pool, and a large circular above-ground pool or water tank. Multiple outdoor seating and shaded areas are present, along with a row of neatly trimmed shrubs at the front. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of narrow horizontal and larger rectangular panes. The main entryway is understated, featuring a simple door and a paved path leading through the front landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with beige walls, wooden accents, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and outdoor seating. Asymmetrical windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, garage door, and a row of shrubs along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat roof, upper wooden structure, and the backyard with a pool and circular tank.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the expansive backyard, swimming pool, circular pool/tank, and multiple outdoor seating areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the length of the house, flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and backyard features.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a paved path, no porch, flanked by shrubs and minimal decorative elements.
